channel.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
channel.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

image.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
image.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

item.title: Ex-Wimbledon champion Vondrousova banned for refusing drug test
item.description: Marketa Vondrousova, who won Wimbledon in 2023, was issued a four year suspension after she refused to submit a ⁠sample.

item.title: Why has Keir Starmer resigned as UK prime minister, and who will take over?
item.description: The United Kingdom will have its seventh prime minister in a decade.

item.title: Qatar PM denies snubbing US vice president in viral video
item.description: Qatar's Prime Minister told Al Jazeera that reports of him snubbing the US vice president were unfounded.

item.title: Argentina vs Austria LIVE: World Cup 2026
item.description: Follow updates as Messi's Argentina play Austria in Group J, including the build-up, analysis and live text commentary.

item.title: China adds 10 US firms, including rare-earth miner, to export control list
item.description: Export ban follows move by Pentagon to blacklist major Chinese companies such as Alibaba and Baidu.

item.title: Pakistan issues nationwide alert over fears of heavy rains, floods
item.description: Warning comes as country braces for likely fourth consecutive year of punishing monsoon, expected to arrive this month.

item.title: Far-right de la Espriella elected Colombia president: What’s next?
item.description: Election results show Trump-endorsed millionaire Abelardo de la Espriella wins by razor-thin margin.

item.title: JD Vance touts progress on key issues in US-Iran negotiations
item.description: JD Vance touts progress on key issues in US-Iran negotiations.

item.title: US strike on an alleged drug boat in eastern Pacific kills two
item.description: SOUTHCOM said it notified the US Coast Guard about the 'six male survivors' without providing details of their rescue.

item.title: Gaza’s surfers seek solace from war in the Mediterranean Sea
item.description: Surfers still ride the waves off Gaza despite the ever-present threat of becoming an Israeli military target.

item.title: How Canada’s Muslims face ‘perfect storm’ amid rising xenophobia
item.description: As anti-immigrant rhetoric intensifies in Canada, community advocates say Muslim communities face heightened risks.

item.title: Ebola cases surpass 1,000 in DR Congo amid violence and displacement
item.description: Overcrowded camps in DR Congo face heightened risks, with displacement adding layers of complexity to the Ebola crisis.

item.title: The ICC must investigate Israel’s genocidal use of sexual violence
item.description: There is a growing body of evidence of the systematic nature of sexual assaults against Palestinian detainees.

item.title: Israel kills turtle conservationist Mona Khalil
item.description: Turtle conservationist Mona Khalil has died after an Israeli air strike on her home near Tyre, Lebanon.

item.title: Political turmoil: UK will see its seventh prime minister in 10 years
item.description: After less than two years as PM, Keir Starmer announces his resignation amid mounting pressure from own Labour Party.

item.title: Why Coca-Cola and the US taxman are at war over a $20bn tax bill
item.description: Beverage giant is appealing a 2020 ruling that has major implications for how much tax firms pay on overseas profits.

item.title: ‘I leave the biggest job’: Keir Stamer’s resignation speech in full
item.description: Starmer resigned as Labour leader after losing his party's support and as Andy Burnham eyes the UK's top position.

item.title: Vance’s warning to Israel signals a new phase in US-Israeli relations
item.description: There won’t be a rupture, but there won’t be business as usual, either.

item.title: Cairo erupts in celebration after Egypt’s first ever win in a World Cup
item.description: Cairo erupts in celebration after Egypt’s first ever win in a World Cup.

item.title: British parliament to debate Israeli influence on UK politics: What we know
item.description: The debate comes after a petition expressed concern over Israeli lobbies' influence in the UK.

item.title: UK Labour Party Leadership contest may loom after UK PM Starmer resigns
item.description: UK Labour Party Leadership contest may loom after UK PM Starmer resigns.

item.title: ‘No sense of direction’: The downfall of Keir Starmer
item.description: The British prime minister took office at a challenging time, but critics accuse him of weakness and poor judgement.

item.title: ‘Daily cuts… infections’: India’s e-waste workers face toxic health risks
item.description: As digital consumption grows and e-waste mounts, burden of managing that waste falls on workers with little protection.

item.title: UK Prime Minister Keir Starmer’s resignation speech in full
item.description: The UK is to get its seventh prime minister in less than 10 years, after Keir Starmer confirmed he is to step down.

item.title: Watch World Cup Day 11: Egypt’s first-ever win; Spain crushes Saudi Arabia
item.description: Latest match highlights, reaction and previews from the FIFA World Cup 2026 in North America.
